content.fact_text: Defines production-ready TypeScript domain types and repository interfaces for order management.

provenance_data.behaviour: Defines core order domain models, state transition contexts, and repository interfaces for the transactional checkout service. Maintains type safety and supports optimistic concurrency control.
interfaces: IOrderRepository.updateStatus(order_id: string, next_status: OrderStatus, current_version: number, context?: OrderTransitionContext, tx?: unknown): Promise<RepositoryResult<Order>>
provenance_data.utility: Provides the type-safe contract required by the State Machine and Repository implementations to ensure architectural consistency and data integrity.
